title: 5 DAY WORK WEEK KITCHEN CREW 5 天制厨房员工
description:
Job Description & Requirements

RESPONSIBILITY

- Food preparation and cooking for all customers
- Preparation work of Kitchen opening and closing operation hours
- Food Hygiene management
- Assist other positions whenever required to meet customer satisfaction.
- Any other job related duties requested from senior staff

REQUIREMENTS (FULL TIME)
- Singaporeans only
Attributes: Sincere and willing to learn attitude.

Able to work in fast-paced environment.

REQUIREMENTS (PART TIME)
- Singaporeans only

- Flexible work hours

Mon-Thurs $12/hr
Fri-Sun $13.50/hr

Public Holiday $16/hr

Interested applicants may apply for further discussion on work schedule

BENEFITS (FULL TIME)

- Staff Meal provided

- Staff discount

- Birthday voucher

- Attendance Incentive

- Monthly Sales Incentive

- Annual leave from 10days

- Medical and dental entitlement

- Local Loyalty Incentive (Singaporeans only)

- Regular performance appraisals

- Opportunity for career advancement

- Performance Bonus (subject to company's performance)

SIGN-UP BONUS OF *$500 FOR ALL NEW FULL TIME JOINERS FOR LIMITED TIME ONLY

postedCompany.description:
The Watami Group was established in 1982 and started off in the Japanese dining-out restaurant business with the key concept of providing a place for all occasions and a comfortable space. Founded by our founder, Mr Watanabe Miki at the age of 24, the Ishokuya concept “Watami” was developed with more than 640 domestic outlets and over 100 overseas outlets, of different operation types currently established.


Watami Group’s slogan is “to receive the most number of thank-you in the world”.  As part of our endless pursue to achieve our slogan, Watami has also expanded from its original food & beverage line to other areas and industries such as nursing care, organic farming, agricultural, ecological initiatives as well as building of schools in third world countries such as the SAJ (School Aid Japan) in Cambodia.


Watami has 6 existing outlets namely Junction 8@Bishan MRT, Star Vista@Buona Vista MRT, City Square@Farrer Park MRT, Downtown East@Pasir Ris, Bugis+ and Woodleigh Mall.


In April 2017, Watami Singapore has launched a new brand Niku Kappo at the existing ION Orchard location.

Watami is continuously growing and opening more new outlets every year.
postedCompany.name: WATAMI FOOD SERVICE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
